name: nvidia_nim
explanation: NVIDIA NIM (Inference Microservice) exposes Prometheus metrics on a single canonical `/metrics` endpoint, defaulting to port 8000. The check is a thin OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 subclass with one required field (`openmetrics_endpoint`). Pattern A: a single canonical OpenMetrics URL with a fixed port and path. The version metadata sub-call simply rewrites `/metrics` to `/v1/version` on the same host; no extra user input. No existing auto_conf.yaml on disk, but discovery is straightforward.
